channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: NEWS: Two people have climbed to the top of the Empire State…
item.author: MeidasTouch (@meidastouch.com)
item.description: NEWS: Two people have climbed to the top of the Empire State Building antenna. They are holding a banner that reads: “When the power of love beats the love of power, the world knows peace”
item.content:encoded: NEWS: Two people have climbed to the top of the Empire State Building antenna. They are holding a banner that reads: “When the power of love beats the love of power, the world knows peace”

item.title: 深夜なのでこっそり話しちゃいます🌙 実は面接の日 緊張しすぎて敬語が変になってました笑笑 でも皆さん優しくて 研修も一…
item.author: S (@saaasaaaki.bsky.social)
item.description:
深夜なのでこっそり話しちゃいます🌙
実は面接の日 緊張しすぎて敬語が変になってました笑笑
でも皆さん優しくて 研修も一から丁寧に教えてもらえて 今の私がありますん(*^^*)❤︎
そっと覗いてみるのもありかも…(#^.^#)♡
item.content:encoded:
深夜なのでこっそり話しちゃいます🌙
実は面接の日 緊張しすぎて敬語が変になってました笑笑
でも皆さん優しくて 研修も一から丁寧に教えてもらえて 今の私がありますん(*^^*)❤︎
そっと覗いてみるのもありかも…(#^.^#)♡

item.title: A photographer sues The Daily Mail in New York over "systema…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
A photographer sues The Daily Mail in New York over "systematic" lifting of thousands of images from social media without permission from copyright holders (Charlotte Tobitt/Press Gazette)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
A photographer sues The Daily Mail in New York over "systematic" lifting of thousands of images from social media without permission from copyright holders (Charlotte Tobitt/Press Gazette)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐ…
item.author: GRIM×AI秘書MIRA (@grim1149.bsky.social)
item.description:
デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐプライバシーフィルター、信頼性の高いUSBハブなど、日常の小さな一手間が情報を守ります。「情報セキュリティ」「プライバシー」で探してみてください 🛡️

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #セキュリティ
item.content:encoded:
デジタルを使いこなすほど、セキュリティ対策も大切になりますね 🔐 パスワード管理の基礎が学べる入門書や、のぞき見を防ぐプライバシーフィルター、信頼性の高いUSBハブなど、日常の小さな一手間が情報を守ります。「情報セキュリティ」「プライバシー」で探してみてください 🛡️

🛒 楽天市場で探す →

#AIテックニュース #楽天市場 #GRIM厳選 #セキュリティ

item.title: I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally so…
item.author: New York Attorney General Letitia James (@newyorkstateag.bsky.social)
item.description:
I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally sold puppies to New Yorkers, exposing them to exorbitant veterinary bills for animals raised in inhumane puppy mills.
 
I'll continue to ensure that animals are healthy and protected, and that abusive breeders are stopped.
item.content:encoded:
I'm suing Puppy Boutique in Brooklyn after they illegally sold puppies to New Yorkers, exposing them to exorbitant veterinary bills for animals raised in inhumane puppy mills.
 
I'll continue to ensure that animals are healthy and protected, and that abusive breeders are stopped.

item.title: Comcast co-CEO Brian Roberts spent his career building an in…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description: Comcast co-CEO Brian Roberts spent his career building an integrated cable giant. To grow, he now plans to split it apart.
item.content:encoded: Comcast co-CEO Brian Roberts spent his career building an integrated cable giant. To grow, he now plans to split it apart.

item.title: The older I get, the more I understand why water has been so…
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: The older I get, the more I understand why water has been so revered in so many cultures. Not because people worshipped the water itself, but because they recognized that without water, nothing else exists. Water is the thread that holds every living system together.
item.content:encoded: The older I get, the more I understand why water has been so revered in so many cultures. Not because people worshipped the water itself, but because they recognized that without water, nothing else exists. Water is the thread that holds every living system together.

item.title: Ehi chi ha spento la luce? Che scherzi del gatto sono, quest…
item.author: Zoalord Alkampfer (@zoalord74.bsky.social)
item.description:
Ehi chi ha spento la luce?
Che scherzi del gatto sono, questi?
(speriamo che non faccia bordelli 🙄🤞)
item.content:encoded:

item.title: "つまりFAEは、英国の担当者がいちばん頻繁に使いたい相手（未成年かどうかの判断に迷う年齢層のアフリカ系出身者で、精神的…
item.author: yomoyomo (@yomoyomo.bsky.social)
item.description:
"つまりFAEは、英国の担当者がいちばん頻繁に使いたい相手（未成年かどうかの判断に迷う年齢層のアフリカ系出身者で、精神的にも肉体的にも疲れ果てている若者）の年齢推定が最も苦手だということになる。つまるところ「その仕事には不向きな技術」と言ってもいいだろう。"
inods.co.jp/topics/repor...
item.content:encoded:
"つまりFAEは、英国の担当者がいちばん頻繁に使いたい相手（未成年かどうかの判断に迷う年齢層のアフリカ系出身者で、精神的にも肉体的にも疲れ果てている若者）の年齢推定が最も苦手だということになる。つまるところ「その仕事には不向きな技術」と言ってもいいだろう。"
inods.co.jp/topics/repor...

item.title: 特殊文芸誌『ピリオディカル たべるのがおそい』本日７月１日創刊です。書店と図書館のフリーペーパー用のデータのみの文芸誌で…
item.author: 西崎憲 (@kennishizaki.bsky.social)
item.description:
特殊文芸誌『ピリオディカル たべるのがおそい』本日７月１日創刊です。書店と図書館のフリーペーパー用のデータのみの文芸誌です。読むには書店と図書館に製本していただくしかありません。大変融通のきかないものです。
新文芸誌よろしくお願いいたします。
p-tabeoso.sakuraweb.com
item.content:encoded:
特殊文芸誌『ピリオディカル たべるのがおそい』本日７月１日創刊です。書店と図書館のフリーペーパー用のデータのみの文芸誌です。読むには書店と図書館に製本していただくしかありません。大変融通のきかないものです。
新文芸誌よろしくお願いいたします。
p-tabeoso.sakuraweb.com

item.title: Manatees weighing over 500 kg navigate a narrow tidal creek …
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: Manatees weighing over 500 kg navigate a narrow tidal creek with pinpoint precision, using their pectoral fins like oars. Wildlife gets the right of way.
item.content:encoded: Manatees weighing over 500 kg navigate a narrow tidal creek with pinpoint precision, using their pectoral fins like oars. Wildlife gets the right of way.

item.title: The U.S. has been “way more divided” throughout history than…
item.author: Politico (@politico.com)
item.description:
The U.S. has been “way more divided” throughout history than it is now, argues documentarian Ken Burns.

“We can't be Chicken Littles sitting around fretting about the sky is falling all the time without ... doing something about it,” he told Dasha Burns on #TheConversation.

🔗 politi.co/4eFwufA
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. has been “way more divided” throughout history than it is now, argues documentarian Ken Burns.

“We can't be Chicken Littles sitting around fretting about the sky is falling all the time without ... doing something about it,” he told Dasha Burns on #TheConversation.

🔗 politi.co/4eFwufA

item.title: The bet was made by an anonymous user with a Ukrainian flag …
item.author: Forbes (@forbes.com)
item.description: The bet was made by an anonymous user with a Ukrainian flag as his display photo and it comes amid concerns about insider betting on major geopolitical events.
item.content:encoded: The bet was made by an anonymous user with a Ukrainian flag as his display photo and it comes amid concerns about insider betting on major geopolitical events.

item.title: Sonny's old family abandoned him and he waited forever for t…
item.author: Niall Harbison (@niallharbison.bsky.social)
item.description:
Sonny's old family abandoned him and he waited forever for them to come back home, but they never did.

After we built him back up and got him healthy, he now has a new family, and as you can see, he could not be happier. This beautiful boy fully deserves
item.content:encoded:
Sonny's old family abandoned him and he waited forever for them to come back home, but they never did.

After we built him back up and got him healthy, he now has a new family, and as you can see, he could not be happier. This beautiful boy fully deserves

item.title: ICE finds a new way to dodge Congress about a secret protest…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description: ICE finds a new way to dodge Congress about a secret protester database
item.content:encoded: ICE finds a new way to dodge Congress about a secret protester database

item.title: Duncan’s conviction was based largely on now-discredited bit…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Duncan’s conviction was based largely on now-discredited bite mark evidence presented by forensic dentist Michael West and pathologist Steven Hayne.

He was the 10th prisoner to be freed after being convicted in part due to the pair’s evidence.

By @richardawebster.bsky.social
item.content:encoded:
Duncan’s conviction was based largely on now-discredited bite mark evidence presented by forensic dentist Michael West and pathologist Steven Hayne.

He was the 10th prisoner to be freed after being convicted in part due to the pair’s evidence.

By @richardawebster.bsky.social

item.description: Forecasters expect a coronal mass ejection and a powerful X-class solar flare could impact the Earth starting on Thursday.

item.title: Little Cookie update: his new mum isn't great at pics. Isn't…
item.author: Ginger Cat Dusty (@gingercatdusty.bsky.social)
item.description: Little Cookie update: his new mum isn't great at pics. Isn't attached to her phone like I am but she did manage to get this during a break from a grooming. He's doing great. Alive & well & a proud Canadian catto 🍁
item.content:encoded: Little Cookie update: his new mum isn't great at pics. Isn't attached to her phone like I am but she did manage to get this during a break from a grooming. He's doing great. Alive & well & a proud Canadian catto 🍁

item.title: More than a year after first trying to buy Infowars, The Oni…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: More than a year after first trying to buy Infowars, The Onion will debut a parody of under its own website with plans to give some of the revenue to families of the victims in the Sandy Hook Elementary School shooting.
item.content:encoded: More than a year after first trying to buy Infowars, The Onion will debut a parody of under its own website with plans to give some of the revenue to families of the victims in the Sandy Hook Elementary School shooting.

item.title: HOLY SHIT. FIFA President Gianni Infantino is at the USA g…
item.author: Eliza Orlins (@elizaorlins.bsky.social)
item.description:
HOLY SHIT.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino is at the USA game, sitting with Howard Lutnick, Secretary of Commerce AND CLOSE PERSONAL FRIEND OF JEFFREY EPSTEIN.

Disgusting.
item.content:encoded:
HOLY SHIT.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino is at the USA game, sitting with Howard Lutnick, Secretary of Commerce AND CLOSE PERSONAL FRIEND OF JEFFREY EPSTEIN.

Disgusting.

item.title: Nothing will wake you up faster in the middle of the night t…
item.author: For the Love of Missy (@missybbbobtail.bsky.social)
item.description:

The criminal:
item.content:encoded:

item.title: Good morning! It's Thursday in case you've been living in a …
item.author: Jen (@jen-notjenny.bsky.social)
item.description:
Good morning! It's Thursday in case you've been living in a cave.

It's not really that deep.

Grab your cup and let's get it!
item.content:encoded:
Good morning! It's Thursday in case you've been living in a cave.

It's not really that deep.

Grab your cup and let's get it!

item.title: During his two decades in the New Jersey Senate, Tom Kean Jr…
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description: During his two decades in the New Jersey Senate, Tom Kean Jr. consistently opposed paid sick leave for his constituents.
item.content:encoded: During his two decades in the New Jersey Senate, Tom Kean Jr. consistently opposed paid sick leave for his constituents.

item.title: I hang on to my water molecules for an average of 99 years. …
item.author: Lake Michigan (@lakemichigan13.bsky.social)
item.description:
I hang on to my water molecules for an average of 99 years. Lake Superior is 191 years.
Translation for humans = don’t put stuff in the Great Lakes (your freshwater supply)
Clean water is life 🌊🌊
item.content:encoded:
I hang on to my water molecules for an average of 99 years. Lake Superior is 191 years.
Translation for humans = don’t put stuff in the Great Lakes (your freshwater supply)
Clean water is life 🌊🌊

item.title: 💛🎈🔆 happy disabled dogs 📍roar rehab 🇮🇳 india ❤️🤍💙
item.author: 💙🪄 Keep Rising 🪄💙 (@keeprising.bsky.social)
item.description:
💛🎈🔆 happy disabled dogs
📍roar rehab 🇮🇳 india ❤️🤍💙
item.content:encoded:
💛🎈🔆 happy disabled dogs
📍roar rehab 🇮🇳 india ❤️🤍💙
